# Summit Marketing

> Mississippi's results-driven digital marketing agency — Reaching New Heights Together.

Summit Marketing is a full-service digital marketing agency founded in 2024, serving businesses across Mississippi and the broader Southeast. We specialize in SEO, content marketing, brand strategy, email marketing, social media management, conversion rate optimization (CRO), and marketing automation. Our philosophy is simple: measurable results, transparent pricing, and a partnership built around your growth.

## Who We Serve

Local businesses, regional brands, and growing companies across Mississippi — from startups establishing their digital presence to established businesses ready to scale. We are especially strong in markets like Jackson, Gulfport, Biloxi, Hattiesburg, Meridian, Tupelo, and Southaven.

## Services

### Marketing Retainer Plans

- **Basecamp** ($997/month): SEO audit & ongoing on-page optimization, 2 content pieces per month, monthly email newsletter, analytics reporting. Ideal for businesses starting their digital marketing journey.
- **Elevate** ($1,997/month): Everything in Basecamp plus brand strategy, 4 content pieces per month, social media management, email nurture sequences, and CRO audits.
- **Ascent** ($2,997/month — Most Popular): Full-funnel marketing strategy, custom landing pages, marketing automation workflows, Voice AI and Conversation AI integration, and a dedicated account manager.
- **Peak** (Custom pricing): Enterprise-grade marketing with a custom growth roadmap, multi-channel paid media, PR and authority building, unlimited funnels, and priority support.

### Web Design Services

- **Trailhead** ($300–$2,000): 5–10 page template-based website. Fast, clean, mobile-first.
- **Pinnacle** ($2,000–$5,000): Fully custom-designed website. Most popular for growing businesses.
- **Apex** ($5,000–$20,000+): Complex builds including e-commerce, custom integrations, and advanced functionality.

Every Summit site includes: conversion-first design, SEO built in from day one, Core Web Vitals optimization, and full marketing stack integration (CRM, analytics, email, automation).
